title: senna pendula var. advena
intro: Senna pendula var. advena, also known as the Mexican prickly ash or Christmas bush, is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It is a shrub-like plant that has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its laxative effects due to the presence of anthraquinone glycosides. The health benefits of Senna pendula var. advena include its ability to relieve constipation, aid in weight loss, and reduce inflammation. Senna pendula var. advena can be prepared as a herbal tea by steeping its leaves in hot water, or it can be used as a dried leaf powder in capsule form for its medicinal effects.
